items.title: A/B and multivariate experiments
items.description: Report lift in conversion, revenue, or engagement with confidence intervals so product teams know whether an observed change is statistically distinguishable from chance.

items.title: Model evaluation reports
items.description: Publish accuracy, F1, or calibration error with intervals (analytic or bootstrap) on holdout or cross-validated scores instead of single-point leaderboard numbers.

items.title: Production SLO monitoring
items.description: Plot CIs for mean latency, error rate, or token usage to distinguish transient spikes from sustained regressions after a deployment.

items.title: Human evaluation of LLM outputs
items.description: When raters score a sample of prompts, intervals for win-rate or average quality score show whether a prompt change truly improved user-visible behavior.
